ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the county (people per square mile) */,
  "land_area" TEXT /* Land area of the county (square miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Code representing the age group (e.g., AGE04) */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., Age 0-4) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the age group in the county */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population for the age group in the county */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population for the age group in the county */,
  "collection_year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the data collection process */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection and analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report for download */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pdf, csv) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South, West) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_demographics" (
  "age_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population within the age group for the county */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population within the age group for the county */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population within the age group for the county */,
  "median_age" TEXT /* Median age of the population in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_details" (
  "age_group_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group detail record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., educational needs) */,
  "educational_needs" TEXT /* Educational needs of the age group */,
  "healthcare_needs" TEXT /* Healthcare needs of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_details_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic record */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in that year for the county */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population in that year for the county */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population in that year for the county */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the population in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median household income in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" TEXT /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" TEXT /* High school graduation rate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_patterns" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "migration_rate" TEXT /* Migration rate in the county */,
  "inflow" INTEGER /* Number of people moving into the county */,
  "outflow" INTEGER /* Number of people moving out of the county */,
  "net_migration" INTEGER /* Net migration in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_patterns_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
